requirements.task_name: Book the cheapest immediate economy taxi under $20 from home to the station
requirements.task_description: From the homepage, set up an immediate ride from '123 Maple Street' to 'Downtown Central Station', filter to economy rides, sort by price, and book the cheapest option with an estimated fare of $20 or less, paying in cash.

requirements.task_name: Schedule a sedan ride to the airport tomorrow at 8:30 AM with promo so total is under $35
requirements.task_description: Use the scheduling feature to book a sedan for tomorrow at 8:30 AM from '45 Oak Avenue' to 'City Airport Terminal 1'. Apply promo code 'OFFICE10' and select the cheapest sedan whose final estimated fare after discount is $35 or less.

requirements.task_name: Book a multi-stop trip for 3 passengers in a minivan for under $40
requirements.task_description: Set up a trip for 3 passengers starting at '200 Pine Street', picking up a friend at 'Lakeside Shopping Mall', and ending at 'Lakeside Park'. Filter for vehicles that seat at least 4 passengers, select a minivan option under $40, and pay by card.

requirements.task_name: Save Home and Work addresses and start a booking using the saved Work address
requirements.task_description: Use the profile or saved places section to create two saved addresses labeled 'Home' and 'Work', then start a new ride booking from the saved 'Work' address to 'City Library' using a standard taxi.

requirements.task_name: Book the highest-rated wheelchair-accessible ride under $30 for this afternoon
requirements.task_description: Set up a ride for this afternoon from 'Sunny Care Clinic' to 'Greenwood Community Center', filter to wheelchair-accessible vehicles, sort by rating, and select the highest-rated option with an estimated fare under $30.

requirements.task_name: Modify an upcoming airport ride to change the pickup time and upgrade the car class
requirements.task_description: Find an existing upcoming booking in 'My Trips' for a ride to the airport, reschedule its pickup time from 9:00 AM to 8:45 AM, and upgrade the vehicle class from Economy to Standard, then save the changes.

requirements.task_name: Cancel the soonest upcoming ride and choose wallet credit as the refund method
requirements.task_description: Go to the list of upcoming rides, select the soonest one, cancel it, select a cancellation reason, and choose to receive any refund as wallet credit rather than other refund methods.

requirements.task_name: Contact support about an overcharged fare on the most recent completed trip
requirements.task_description: Access the help section, select the latest completed trip, choose a billing issue, describe the overcharge (charged $25 instead of shown $18), and submit the issue via in-site chat or message form.
